title: Ghostwriting Principles
description: Writing in someone else's voice: interviewing, capturing cadence, disappearing on the page.
summary_pt_br: Ghostwriting: tornar-se invisível. Entrevistar, capturar cadência, revisar na voz do outro.

scenes.subtitle_en: Writing in someone else's voice: interviewing, capturing cadence, disappearing on the page.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Ghostwriting: tornar-se invisível. Entrevistar, capturar cadência, revisar na voz do outro.

scenes.text_en: Writing in someone else's voice: interviewing, capturing cadence, disappearing on the page. Focus: ghostwriting principles. A good ghost writes better than the author would on their worst day.
scenes.text_pt: Ghostwriting: tornar-se invisível. Entrevistar, capturar cadência, revisar na voz do outro. Foco: ghostwriting principles. Um bom ghost escreve melhor que o autor no pior dia.

scenes.title: Ghostwriting Principles
scenes.body_en: Ghost's job: become invisible. Interview deeply. Record cadence patterns (favorite phrases, rhythm). Draft. Read aloud in their voice. Revise toward their tone, not yours.
scenes.body_pt: Ghostwriting: tornar-se invisível. Entrevistar, capturar cadência, revisar na voz do outro.

examples.en: A good ghost writes better than the author would on their worst day.
examples.pt: Um bom ghost escreve melhor que o autor no pior dia.

examples.en: Cadence is the author's invisible fingerprint.
examples.pt: Cadência é a digital invisível do autor.

examples.en: Read the draft aloud in their voice, not yours.
examples.pt: Leia em voz alta na voz dele, não na sua.

exercise.question: Complete: "A good ghost ___ better than the author would on their worst day."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "A good ghost writes better than the author would on their worst day."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Um bom ghost escreve melhor que o autor no pior dia.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Cadence is the author's invisible fingerprint.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Cadence is the author's invisible fingerprint."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cadência é a digital invisível do autor.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Ghostwriting Principles — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre ghostwriting principles. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, capture the author's cadence first.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I record three hours before drafting.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you find their favorite phrases?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Killing my own voice on the page.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: They say 'that's exactly how I think'.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Ghostwriting is love dressed as disappearance.

scenes.title: The memoir project
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the ghostwriter's four steps. Use at least three ghostwriting terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In his home studio, Joca met a former CEO whose memoir he would spend eight months writing.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: A good ghostwriter writes better than the author would write on their very worst day alone.

paragraphs.speaker: CEO
paragraphs.en: But the result has to sound like me — not like a professional writer pretending to be me cleverly.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: I record three hours of interviews before I even draft a single sentence of the first chapter.

paragraphs.speaker: CEO
paragraphs.en: My friends will tell me it sounds like me — that's the test that matters, honestly.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Ghostwriting, Joca believed, is the quiet art of loving a voice enough to vanish inside it completely for months.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Ghostwriting Principles". Writing in someone else's voice: interviewing, capturing cadence, disappearing on the page. A good ghost writes better than the author would on their worst day. Cadence is the author's invisible fingerprint. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Ghostwriting Principles". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
